reviews.review_description: The game and the story is very well put together. BUT ITS IMPOSSIBLE TO WIN! I spent all day playing this hitting all of the options, even in all different orders. BUT YOU CANT WIN! its always gonna say GAME OVER. You should try it out but don't take the time to hit every option.  ATTENTION TO THE CREATORS! PLEASE MAKE A WAY TO WIN!

It’s about as realistic as if a Victorian school child were to go to a modern party but you get the idea. The effort is there though. Perhaps this would work best as a say no to drugs campaign for primary school kids
